Interactive overview of medical-aid deliveries to hospitals. Hover for the name, click for full details, filter by Shipment ID or Shipment Date. Marker size reflects the relative quantity delivered. 

Note that 'Number of beds' is a metric used to reflect the size of the receiving medical institution.
